email_body:
Beste mevrouw Manco,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Klantendienstmedewerker Sales bij FORUM JOBS BREE NV. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte salesmedewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en klantcommunicatie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik dagelijks bezig met het beantwoorden van klantvragen, het opvolgen van bestellingen en het ondersteunen van marketingacties. Ik werk nauwkeurig met Word en Excel, en typ vlot. Mijn kennis van auto-onderdelen is beperkt, maar ik leer snel en ben gemotiveerd om me hierin te verdiepen.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1-niveau — ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik beschik over eigen vervoer en ben fulltime beschikbaar van maandag tot vrijdag.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ms. Manco,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Sales position at FORUM JOBS BREE NV. Your call for a customer-oriented sales employee aligns perfectly with my experience in digital marketing and customer communication.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle customer inquiries via phone, email, and WhatsApp, create proformas, follow up on orders, and support marketing campaigns. I work accurately with Word and Excel and type quickly. My knowledge of auto parts is limited, but I am a fast learner and motivated to develop this.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level — I am currently taking classes to improve further. I have my own transport and am available full-time Monday to Friday.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in a personal interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste mevrouw Manco,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Klantendienstmedewerker Sales bij FORUM JOBS BREE NV. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte salesmedewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en klantcommunicatie.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik dagelijks bezig met het beantwoorden van klantvragen via telefoon, e-mail en WhatsApp. Ik maak proforma’s op, volg bestellingen correct op en ondersteun marketingacties om producten onder de aandacht te brengen. Daarnaast plaats ik online advertenties via verschillende platformen. Deze taken hebben mij een sterk commercieel inzicht gegeven en geleerd om rustig te blijven onder druk.

Ik werk nauwkeurig met Word en Excel en typ vlot. Mijn kennis van auto-onderdelen is beperkt, maar ik ben een snelle leerling en gemotiveerd om me hierin te verdiepen. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1-niveau — ik volg momenteel lessen om dit verder te verbeteren. Kennis van Frans en Duits heb ik nog niet, maar ik sta open om deze talen te leren.

Ik beschik over eigen vervoer en ben fulltime beschikbaar van maandag tot vrijdag. Ik werk graag in team, maar kan ook zelfstandig functioneren. Uw aanbod met interne opleiding, marktconform loon en aangename werksfeer spreekt mij zeer aan.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Ms. Manco,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Sales position at FORUM JOBS BREE NV. Your call for a customer-oriented sales employee aligns perfectly with my experience in digital marketing and customer communication.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle customer inquiries via phone, email, and WhatsApp. I create proformas, follow up on orders correctly, and support marketing campaigns to promote products. I also place online advertisements on various platforms. These tasks have given me strong commercial insight and taught me to stay calm under pressure.

I work accurately with Word and Excel and type quickly. My knowledge of auto parts is limited, but I am a fast learner and motivated to develop this. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and my Dutch is at B1 level — I am currently taking classes to improve further. I do not yet know French or German, but I am open to learning these languages.

I have my own transport and am available full-time Monday to Friday. I enjoy working in a team but can also work independently. Your offer with internal training, competitive salary, and pleasant working atmosphere appeals to me greatly.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in a personal interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Customer-facing experience: handles inquiries via phone, email, and WhatsApp, creates proformas, and follows up on orders.
• Commercial insight: supports marketing campaigns and places online advertisements to promote products.
• Accurate and fast typing: works with Word and Excel daily.
• Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch B1 (actively improving).
• Own transport and full-time availability Monday to Friday.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I handle customer inquiries, create proformas, follow up on orders, and support marketing campaigns. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & sales: handling inquiries via phone, email, WhatsApp; creating proformas; order follow-up; supporting marketing campaigns; placing online advertisements
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Handle customer inquiries via phone, email, and WhatsApp; create proformas and follow up on orders
- Support marketing campaigns and place online advertisements on various platforms
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
